name: Corky's Daily Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Warm water (85°F for regular yeast, 100°F for rapid rise)
1 tsp Coarse salt or 3/4 tsp table salt
1/4 tsp Ascorbic acid crystals (such as Fruit Fresh or EverFresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Proof yeast in half a cup of warm water with molasses. Stir until foamy.
2. Add the yeast mixture to two cups of unbleached flour along with an additional half cup of warm water. Mix with your hands or an electric mixer until well developed, about 2 minutes.
3. Mix remaining liquid ingredients (last quarter cup water and last four dry ingredients) separately. Combine with the first mixture and add the whole wheat flour and milk powder. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until slightly sticky and glossy, adding more flour as needed.
5. Form into a ball and place in an oiled bowl to rise until doubled in size.
6. Punch down the dough and shape into a loaf. Place in an oiled 5x9 bread pan.
7. Cover with a towel and let rise until doubled in size (the dough will expand above the top of the pan).
8. Preheat oven to 425°F and bake for 10 minutes.
9. Reduce temperature to 350°F and continue baking for another 25 minutes.
10. Allow to cool before slicing.
